Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************************

  The category of retracts of a λ-theory

  Given a λ-theory L, we can consider the Karoubi envelope of the monoid (L_1, •). This is
  equivalent to a category R with R_0 the set of terms in L_0 that are idempotent under (function)
  composition, and R(A, B) the set of f: L_0 that are invariant under precomposition with A and
  postcomposition with B.
  This category has terminal objects, binary products, and it is even cartesian closed. On the other
  hand, it is also ill-behaved in some sense, because it has fixpoints for every endomorphism: for
  every f: A -> A, there exists a morphism g: I -> A from the terminal object, such that g · f = f.
  In this case, g looks very much like the Y-combinator.

  Contents
  1. The category of retracts [R]
  2. The terminal object [R_terminal]
  3. Fixpoints [fixpoint_is_fixpoint]
  4. Binary products [R_binproducts]
  4.1 Some properties of the power objects, defined via binary products
  5. Exponential objects [R_exponentials]
  6. Every object is a retract of λ x, x [retraction_is_retraction]
  7. R is equivalent to the category given by the idempotents of L_1 [R_ob_weq_R']

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheories.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheories.

Require Import Ltac2.Ltac2.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope algebraic_theories.
Local Open Scope lambda_calculus.

(** * 1. The category of retracts *)

Section Category.

  Context (L : lambda_theory).
  Context (Lβ : has_β L).

  Context {n : nat}.

  Definition R_ob : UU := ∑ (l : L n), l ∘ l = l.
  Coercion R_ob_to_L (A : R_ob) : L n := pr1 A.
  Definition R_ob_idempotent (A : R_ob) : A ∘ A = A := pr2 A.

  Definition make_R_ob
    (l : L n)
    (Hl : l ∘ l = l)
    : R_ob
    := l ,, Hl.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
A = B

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
A = B

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
isPredicate (λ x : L n, x ∘ x = x)
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
pr1 A = pr1 B

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
isPredicate (λ x : L n, x ∘ x = x)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
x: L n
isaprop (x ∘ x = x)

      apply setproperty.
    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
H: (A : L n) = B
pr1 A = pr1 B

    exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition R_mor (A B : R_ob) : UU := ∑ (f : L n), B ∘ f ∘ A = f.
  Coercion R_mor_to_L {A B : R_ob} (f : R_mor A B) : L n := pr1 f.
  Definition R_mor_is_mor {A B : R_ob} (f : R_mor A B) : B ∘ f ∘ A = f := pr2 f.

  Definition make_R_mor
    {A B : R_ob}
    (f : L n)
    (Hf : B ∘ f ∘ A = f)
    : R_mor A B
    := f ,, Hf.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
B ∘ f = f

B ∘ f = f

B ∘ (B ∘ f ∘ A) = f

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
B ∘ (B ∘ f) ∘ A = f

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
B ∘ B ∘ f ∘ A = f

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
B ∘ f ∘ A = f

    apply R_mor_is_mor.
  Qed.

Lβ: has_β L

A, B: R_ob

B ∘ f ∘ A = f

    apply R_mor_is_mor.
  Qed.

      apply setproperty.

Lβ: has_β L

f, g: R_mor A B

pr1 f = pr1 g
 apply H.
  Qed.

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
∏ c : make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor,
make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ c, c ⟧
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ A, A ⟧

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
A ∘ A ∘ A = A

          abstract (exact (maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) (R_ob_idempotent A) @ R_ob_idempotent A)).
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
∏ a b c : make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor,
make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ a, c ⟧
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
g: R_mor B C
make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor A B
g: R_mor B C
C ∘ (g ∘ f) ∘ A = g ∘ f

          abstract (
            refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) (compose_assoc _ Lβ _ _ _) @ _);
            refine '(!compose_assoc _ Lβ _ _ _ @ _);
            refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) _ @ maponpaths _ _) >
            [ apply R_mor_is_mor_left
            | apply R_mor_is_mor_right ]
          ).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
is_precategory
  (make_precategory_data
     (make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor)
     (λ A : R_ob, A,, R_subproof A)
     (λ (A B C : R_ob) (f : R_mor A B)
      (g : R_mor B C), g ∘ f,, R_subproof0 A B C f g))
 abstract (
          apply make_is_precategory_one_assoc >
          [ intros A B f;
            apply R_mor_eq;
            apply R_mor_is_mor_right
          | intros A B f;
            apply R_mor_eq;
            apply R_mor_is_mor_left
          | intros A B C D f g h;
            apply R_mor_eq;
            symmetry;
            exact (compose_assoc _ Lβ _ _ _) ]
        ).
    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C)
  (make_precategory
     (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor R_ob R_mor)
        (λ A : R_ob, A,, R_subproof A)
        (λ (A B C : R_ob) (f : R_mor A B)
         (g : R_mor B C),
         g ∘ f,, R_subproof0 A B C f g)) R_subproof1)
 abstract (
        intros A B;
        apply isaset_total2 >
        [ apply setproperty
        | intro t;
          apply isasetaprop;
          apply setproperty ]
      ).
  Defined.

(** * 2. The terminal object *)

  Section Terminal.

    Context {c : L n}.

    Definition terminal_term
      : L n
      := abs (inflate c).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c, t: L n
terminal_term ∘ t = terminal_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c, t: L n
terminal_term ∘ t = terminal_term

Lβ: has_β L

c, t: L n
(λ'n,
((λ'1 + n,
 inflate c
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate t var (stnweq (inr tt))))) = terminal_term

(inflate c

     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple var (inflate t var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
terminal_term

  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))) =
var (stnweq (inl i))

      apply extend_tuple_inl.
    Qed.

    Definition terminal
      : R_ob
      := terminal_term ,, terminal_compose _.

    Section Arrow.

      Context (A : R_ob).

      Definition terminal_arrow_term
        : L n
        := terminal_term.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n
A: R_ob
terminal ∘ terminal_arrow_term ∘ A =
terminal_arrow_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n
A: R_ob
terminal ∘ terminal_arrow_term ∘ A =
terminal_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n
A: R_ob
terminal ∘ (terminal_arrow_term ∘ A) =
terminal_arrow_term

        apply terminal_compose.
      Qed.

      Definition terminal_arrow
        : R_mor A terminal
        := terminal_arrow_term ,, terminal_arrow_is_mor.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n

terminal ∘ t ∘ A = pr1 terminal_arrow

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n
A: R_ob
t: R_mor A terminal
terminal ∘ (t ∘ A) = pr1 terminal_arrow

        apply terminal_compose.
      Qed.

    End Arrow.

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
c: L n
A: R
∏ t : R ⟦ A, terminal ⟧, t = terminal_arrow A
 apply terminal_arrow_unique.
    Defined.

  End Terminal.

  Definition R_chosen_terminal
    := R_terminal (c := abs (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
    : Terminal R.

(** * 3. Fixpoints *)

  Section Fixpoints.

    Context (B : R_ob).
    Context (f : R_mor B B).
    Context {c : L n}.

    Definition fixpoint_term_component
      : L (S n)
      := (abs (app
            (inflate (inflate f))
            (app
              (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))).

    Definition fixpoint_term
      : L n
      := abs (app fixpoint_term_component fixpoint_term_component).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
f ∘ fixpoint_term = fixpoint_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
f ∘ fixpoint_term = fixpoint_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ'n,
(inflate f
((λ'1 + n,
 (fixpoint_term_component fixpoint_term_component)
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
fixpoint_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ'n,
(inflate f
((fixpoint_term_component fixpoint_term_component)
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
fixpoint_term

     extend_tuple
       (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
        inflate
          ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
            extend_tuple
              (λ i2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl (...))))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
            • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i1))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
(var (stnweq (inr tt)) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     inflate
       ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
         • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
fixpoint_term_component

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ'S n,
(f
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
        inflate
          ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
            extend_tuple
              (λ i2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl (...))))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
            • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i1))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      inflate
        ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
          extend_tuple

             var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
            (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
          • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     inflate
       ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
         • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
fixpoint_term_component

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ'S n,
(f
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

(extend_tuple
   (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,

        • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   inflate
     ((λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       extend_tuple
         (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
       • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
fixpoint_term_component

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ'S n,
(f
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple

            extend_tuple

            • extend_tuple var (inflate c)) i1))

      (stnweq (inl i)))
(var (stnweq (inr tt)) var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
fixpoint_term_component

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
f
• (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple
     (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      inflate
        (extend_tuple
           (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i1)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0
         • extend_tuple var (inflate c)))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) =
inflate (inflate f)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
f
• (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple
     (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      inflate
        (extend_tuple
           (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i1)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0
         • extend_tuple var (inflate c)))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) =
f
• (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
   • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
    inflate
      (extend_tuple
         (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i1)))))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0
       • extend_tuple var (inflate c)))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) =
(λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl t_l))
 • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
    inflate
      (extend_tuple
         (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i1)))))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0
       • extend_tuple var (inflate c)))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) ~
(λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl t_l))
 • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R_ob
f: R_mor B B
c: L n
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   inflate
     (extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i
      • extend_tuple var (inflate c)))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))) =
var (stnweq (inl i))
• (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

Lβ: has_β L

B: R_ob

i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn

 inflate
   (extend_tuple
      (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
      (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i
    • extend_tuple var (inflate c))) (stnweq (inl i)) =
var (stnweq (inl i))
• (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

B: R_ob

extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))
• (λ i : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
   inflate (extend_tuple var (inflate c) i)) =
var (stnweq (inl i))

B: R_ob

• (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))

      apply inflate_var.
    Qed.

    Definition R_fixpoint
      : R_mor (TerminalObject R_terminal) B
      := _ ,, fixpoint_is_mor.

  End Fixpoints.

(** * 4. Binary products *)

  Section BinProducts.

    Context (A B : R_ob).

    Definition prod_term
      : L n
      := pair_arrow
        (A ∘ π1)
        (B ∘ π2).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
prod_term ∘ prod_term = prod_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
prod_term ∘ prod_term = prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ π1 ∘ prod_term) (B ∘ π2 ∘ prod_term) =
prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ prod_term)) (B ∘ π2 ∘ prod_term) =
prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ prod_term))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ prod_term)) = prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow
  (A
   ∘ (λ'n,
     (inflate A (inflate π1 var (stnweq (inr tt))))))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ prod_term)) = prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow
  (A
   ∘ (λ'n,
     (inflate A (inflate π1 var (stnweq (inr tt))))))
  (B
   ∘ (λ'n,
     (inflate B (inflate π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ A ∘ π1)
  (B
   ∘ (λ'n,
     (inflate B (inflate π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ A ∘ π1) (B ∘ B ∘ π2) = prod_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
pair_arrow (A ∘ π1) (B ∘ B ∘ π2) = prod_term

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, pair_arrow _ (x ∘ _)) (R_ob_idempotent B)).
    Qed.

    Definition prod
      : R_ob
      := prod_term ,, prod_idempotent.

    Definition p1_term
      : L n
      := A ∘ π1.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ p1_term ∘ prod = p1_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ p1_term ∘ prod = p1_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ A ∘ π1 ∘ prod = p1_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ π1 ∘ prod = p1_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ (π1 ∘ prod) = p1_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ (A ∘ π1) = p1_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
A ∘ A ∘ π1 = p1_term

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) (R_ob_idempotent _)).
    Qed.

    Definition p1
      : R_mor prod A
      := p1_term ,, p1_is_mor.

    Definition p2_term
      : L n
      := B ∘ π2.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ p2_term ∘ prod = p2_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ p2_term ∘ prod = p2_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ B ∘ π2 ∘ prod = p2_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ π2 ∘ prod = p2_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ (π2 ∘ prod) = p2_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ (B ∘ π2) = p2_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
B ∘ B ∘ π2 = p2_term

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) (R_ob_idempotent _)).
    Qed.

    Definition p2
      : R_mor prod B
      := p2_term ,, p2_is_mor.

    Section Arrow.

      Context (C : R_ob).
      Context (f : R_mor C A).
      Context (g : R_mor C B).

      Definition prod_arrow_term
        : L n
        := pair_arrow f g.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
prod ∘ prod_arrow_term ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
prod ∘ prod_arrow_term ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ π1 ∘ prod_arrow_term)
  (B ∘ π2 ∘ prod_arrow_term) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ prod_arrow_term))
  (B ∘ π2 ∘ prod_arrow_term) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ prod_arrow_term))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ prod_arrow_term)) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ pair_arrow (A ∘ f) g))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ prod_arrow_term)) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (π1 ∘ pair_arrow (A ∘ f) g))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ pair_arrow f (B ∘ g))) ∘ C =
prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (A ∘ f))
  (B ∘ (π2 ∘ pair_arrow f (B ∘ g))) ∘ C =
prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ (A ∘ f)) (B ∘ (B ∘ g)) ∘ C =
prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (A ∘ f) (B ∘ (B ∘ g)) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow f (B ∘ (B ∘ g)) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow f (B ∘ g) ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow f g ∘ C = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow (f ∘ C) (g ∘ C) = prod_arrow_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pair_arrow f (g ∘ C) = prod_arrow_term

        exact (maponpaths (λ x, pair_arrow _ x) (R_mor_is_mor_right _)).
      Qed.

      Definition prod_arrow
        : R_mor C prod
        := prod_arrow_term ,, prod_arrow_is_mor.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
(prod_arrow : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧) · p1 = f

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
(prod_arrow : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧) · p1 = f

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pr1 (prod_arrow · p1) = pr1 f

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
p1 ∘ pair_arrow (A ∘ f) g = pr1 f

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
A ∘ (π1 ∘ pair_arrow (A ∘ f) g) = pr1 f

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
A ∘ (A ∘ f) = pr1 f

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
A ∘ f = pr1 f

        exact (R_mor_is_mor_left _).
      Qed.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
(prod_arrow : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧) · p2 = g

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
(prod_arrow : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧) · p2 = g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
pr1 (prod_arrow · p2) = pr1 g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
p2 ∘ pair_arrow f (B ∘ g) = pr1 g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
B ∘ (π2 ∘ pair_arrow f (B ∘ g)) = pr1 g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
B ∘ (B ∘ g) = pr1 g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
B ∘ g = pr1 g

        exact (R_mor_is_mor_left _).
      Qed.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
a' = prod_arrow

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
a' = prod_arrow

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
pr1 a' = pr1 prod_arrow

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
prod ∘ a' = pr1 prod_arrow

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
pair_arrow (A ∘ π1 ∘ a') (B ∘ π2 ∘ a') =
pr1 prod_arrow

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B, C: R_ob
f: R_mor C A
g: R_mor C B
a': R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
Ha': a' · p1 = f × a' · p2 = g
pair_arrow (A ∘ π1 ∘ a') (B ∘ π2 ∘ a') =
pair_arrow (a' · p1) g

        exact (maponpaths (λ x, pair_arrow _ (R_mor_to_L x)) (pr2 Ha')).
      Qed.

    End Arrow.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
BinProduct R A B

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
BinProduct R A B

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R ⟦ ?c, A ⟧
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R ⟦ ?c, B ⟧
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
isBinProduct R A B ?c ?f ?g

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R
 exact prod.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R ⟦ prod, A ⟧
 exact p1.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
R ⟦ prod, B ⟧
 exact p2.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
isBinProduct R A B prod p1 p2
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
∏ (c : R) (f : R ⟦ c, A ⟧) (g : R ⟦ c, B ⟧),
∃! k : R ⟦ c, prod ⟧, k · p1 = f × k · p2 = g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
∃! k : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, k · p1 = f × k · p2 = g

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
(λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) ?x
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) y)
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧,
(λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) y
→ y = ?x

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
 exact (prod_arrow C f g).
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
(λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g)
  (prod_arrow C f g)
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
prod_arrow C f g · p1 = f
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
prod_arrow C f g · p2 = g

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
prod_arrow C f g · p1 = f
 apply p1_commutes.
          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
prod_arrow C f g · p2 = g
 apply p2_commutes.
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) y)
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
a: R ⟦ C, prod ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) a)

          apply isapropdirprod;
            apply homset_property.
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R_ob
C: R
f: R ⟦ C, A ⟧
g: R ⟦ C, B ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧,
(λ t : R ⟦ C, prod ⟧, t · p1 = f × t · p2 = g) y
→ y = prod_arrow C f g
 apply prod_arrow_unique.
    Defined.

  End BinProducts.

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
BinProducts R

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
BinProducts R

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A, B: R
BinProduct R A B

    apply R_binproduct.
  Defined.

(** ** 4.1 Some properties of the power objects, defined via binary products *)

  Section BinProductPowers.

    Context {m : nat}.
    Context (A : R_ob).

    Let P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
ProductPr (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
∅

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
(⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn

        exact i.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
ProductPr (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
sn_power_projection R_binproducts
  (nat_rect
     (λ n : ℕ,
      Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
     (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
     (λ (n : ℕ)
      (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
      n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m') i =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (invmap (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement) i) =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (invmap (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement) i) =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (invmap stnweq i) =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (inl i') =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': unit
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (inr i') =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (inl i') =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
  (nat_rect
     (λ n : ℕ,
      Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
     (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
     (λ (n : ℕ)
      (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
      n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m') i'
∘ nat_rect
    (λ n : ℕ,
     Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
    (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
    (λ (n : ℕ)
     (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
     n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m' ∘ π1 =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
  (nat_rect
     (λ n : ℕ,
      Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
     (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
     (λ (n : ℕ)
      (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
      n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m') i'
∘ π1 =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
A ∘ n_π i' ∘ π1 =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')

          exact (!compose_assoc _ Lβ _ _ _).
        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn), ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i
i': unit
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
   R
   ⟦ sn_power_object R_binproducts
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m'),
   A ⟧)
  (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
   BinProductPr1 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R
       (nat_rect
          (λ n : ℕ,
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
          (Terminal_is_empty_product R_chosen_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A) negstn0)
          (λ (n : ℕ)
           (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
           n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
       i')
  (λ _ : unit,
   BinProductPr2 R
     (R_binproducts
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : ℕ,
            Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
              (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A))
           (Terminal_is_empty_product
              R_chosen_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
              negstn0)
           (λ (n : ℕ)
            (IHn : Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn R
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, A)),
            n_power_to_sn_power R_binproducts IHn) m')
        A)) (inr i') =
A
∘ coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
     nat_rect (λ m : ℕ, (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
       (λ i : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, fromempty (negstn0 i))
       (λ (m : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n)
        (i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn),
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit, L n)
          (λ i'0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, IHm i'0 ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)) m' i'
     ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')
 reflexivity.
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P f =
n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, f x)

n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, f x)

B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
ProductArrow (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R P f =

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
(λ'n,
(λ'1 + n,
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, f x)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts 0: Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, f x)

        exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs x))) (extend_tuple_inr _ _ _)).

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
pair_arrow
  (n_tuple_arrow
     (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
       f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inl i))) x))
  (f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inr tt))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, f x)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
(λ'n,
⟨ ((λ'1 + n,
   n_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
      (inflate
         ((λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
           (λ i0 : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn,
            f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inl i0)))
             x) i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))
   • extend_tuple
       (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(inflate (f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inr tt)))
var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, f x)

  (stnweq (inr tt))) =
(inflate (f (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
(f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inl i))
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(inflate (f (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
(f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inl i))
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inr tt))) =
(inflate (f (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
(f (weqdnicoprod m' lastelement (inl i))
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
      (stnweq (inl i))) var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
(inflate (f (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))
 • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))
 • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ~
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl j))
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
var (stnweq (inl j))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) j
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
var (stnweq (inl j))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
m': ℕ
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts (S m'): Product (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn, A)
B: R_ob
f: (⟦ S m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A
IHm: ∏ (P := bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal R_binproducts m')
(f : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn → R_mor B A),
ProductArrow (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn R P f = n_tuple_arrow (λ x : (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn, f x)
i: (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl j)))) =
var (stnweq (inl j))

        apply extend_tuple_inl.
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
P = n_tuple_arrow (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
P = n_tuple_arrow (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   identity P · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
n_tuple_arrow
  (λ x : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
    identity P · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i) x) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
(λ x : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 identity P · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P x) =
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
(λ x : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
 identity P · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P x) ~
(λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A ∘ n_π i)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
identity P · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
A: R_ob
P:= bin_product_power R A R_chosen_terminal
  R_binproducts m: Product (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, A)
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn R P i = A ∘ n_π i

        apply R_power_projection_is_n_π.
    Qed.

  End BinProductPowers.

(** * 5. Exponential objects *)

  Section Exponentials.

    Section Object.

      Definition exponential_term
        {m : nat}
        (B C : L m)
        : L m
        := curry (ev C B).

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
B, C: L m
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
exponential_term B C • f =
exponential_term (B • f) (C • f)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
B, C: L m
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
exponential_term B C • f =
exponential_term (B • f) (C • f)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
B, C: L m
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
curry (ev C B • f) = exponential_term (B • f) (C • f)

        exact (maponpaths curry (subst_ev _ _ _ _)).
      Qed.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
exponential_term B C =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
exponential_term B C =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (ev (inflate C) (inflate B))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(ev (inflate (inflate C)) (inflate (inflate B))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
((λ'1 + S n,
 (inflate (inflate C)
 (inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
 var (stnweq (inr tt))))
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
((inflate (inflate C)
 (inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
 var (stnweq (inr tt))))
 • extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple var
    (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
(inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
   • extend_tuple var
       (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
    extend_tuple
      (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
      (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
    • extend_tuple var
        (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
   • extend_tuple var
       (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate C
 • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var
         (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
(inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))
• (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple
     (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
   • extend_tuple var
       (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: L n
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate C
 • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var
         (inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

      Qed.

      Context (B C : R_ob).

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
exponential_term B C ∘ exponential_term B C =
exponential_term B C

∘ (λ'n, inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B) =
exponential_term B C

        refine '(
          maponpaths (λ x, (abs (_ • x ∘ _ ∘ _ ∘ _ ∘ _))) _ @
          maponpaths (λ x, (abs (_ ∘ _ • x))) _
        );
          apply funextfun;
          intro i;
          refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x • _) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _) @ _);
          refine '(var_subst _ _ _ @ _);
          apply extend_tuple_inl.
      Qed.

      Definition exponential_ob
        : R_ob
        := exponential_term B C ,, exponential_idempotent.

      Definition eval_term
        : L n
        := ev C B.

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
C ∘ eval_term ∘ prod exponential_ob B = eval_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
C ∘ eval_term ∘ prod exponential_ob B = eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
C ∘ eval_term
∘ pair_arrow
    ((λ'n,
     inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
     ∘ π1) (B ∘ π2) = eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
C
∘ (eval_term
   ∘ pair_arrow
       ((λ'n,
        inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
        ∘ π1) (B ∘ π2)) = eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
C
∘ (λ'n,
  (inflate C
  ((inflate
      ((λ'n,
       inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
       ∘ π1) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (inflate B (inflate (B ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate C
((inflate
    ((λ'n,
     inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
     ∘ π1) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B (inflate (B ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))) =
eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate C
((inflate
    (λ'n,
    inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
  ∘ inflate π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B (inflate (B ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))) =
eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate C
((inflate
    (λ'n,
    inflate C ∘ var (stnweq (inr tt)) ∘ inflate B)
  ∘ inflate π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B
(inflate B ∘ inflate π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))) =
eval_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R_ob
(λ'n,
(inflate C

        • extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
((π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(B
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

(inflate (B ∘ B) ∘ inflate B

        refine '(
          maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (app _ (app (_ • x) _))))) _ @
          maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (app _ (app _ (app _ (app (_ • x) _))))))) _
        );
          apply funextfun;
          intro i;
          refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x • _) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _) @ _);
          refine '(var_subst _ _ _ @ _);
          refine '(maponpaths (λ x, (x • _)) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _) @ _);
          refine '(var_subst _ _ _ @ _);
          apply extend_tuple_inl.
      Qed.

      Definition eval_mor
        : R_mor (prod exponential_ob B) C
        := eval_term ,, eval_is_mor.

      Section Lambda.

        Context (A : R_ob).
        Context (h : R_mor (prod A B) C).

        Definition lifted_term
          : L n
          := curry h.

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
exponential_ob ∘ lifted_term ∘ A = lifted_term

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L

B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C

∘ lifted_term ∘ A = lifted_term

 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (inflate A var (...)) (stnweq (...)))
              i0)) (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
      • extend_tuple var
          (lifted_term
           • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              extend_tuple
                (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                 var (stnweq (...)))
                (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))
                (stnweq (inl i0)))
          extend_tuple
            (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0)))
            (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))
            (stnweq (inr tt)))) (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       extend_tuple
         (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0)))
         (inflate
            (B
             • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
                 extend_tuple
                   (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                    inflate (... i1))
                   (var (stnweq (...))) t_l0
                 • extend_tuple var
                     (lifted_term
                      • (λ i1 : ...%stn,
                         extend_tuple ... ... ...)
                     extend_tuple
                       (λ i1 : ...%stn, var ...)
                       (inflate A var (...))
                       (stnweq (...))))
                  (stnweq (inl i0))))
         var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))))
(h
 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ ..., ...) (var ...) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (inflate A var ...))
              i1)) (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
        (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i))) t_l
    • extend_tuple
        (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))
        (inflate
           (B
            • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
               (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
                extend_tuple
                  (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                   inflate ((...) i0))
                  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
                • extend_tuple var
                    (lifted_term
                     • (λ i0 : (...)%stn,
                        extend_tuple (...) (... ...)
                          (...))
                    extend_tuple
                      (λ i0 : (...)%stn, var (...))
                      (inflate A var (stnweq ...))
                      (stnweq (inr tt))))
                 (stnweq (inl i))))
        var (stnweq (inr tt))))
⟨ (A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       extend_tuple
         (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i1)))
         (inflate
            (B
             • (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
                 extend_tuple (λ ..., ...) (var ...)
                   t_l
                 • extend_tuple var
                     (lifted_term • ...
                     extend_tuple ... ... ...))
                  (stnweq (inl i1))))
         var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
        (stnweq (inl i)))
  (λ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))
    (stnweq (inr tt))),
(B
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    inflate
      ((λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            inflate ((λ ..., ...) i1))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
         • extend_tuple var
             (lifted_term
              • (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                 extend_tuple (λ ..., ...)
                   (inflate A var ...) (stnweq ...))
             extend_tuple
               (λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq ...))
               (inflate A var (stnweq (...)))
               (stnweq (inr tt)))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
         i)) var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩)))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
(inflate (inflate h)
⟨ (inflate (inflate A) ∘ π1
  ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
  var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩),
(inflate (inflate B) ∘ π2
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩) ⟩))))

Lβ: has_β L

h: R_mor (prod A B) C

(λ'S n,

 • (λ t_l : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ i1 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (inflate A var (...)) (stnweq (...)))
              i0)) (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
      • extend_tuple var
          (lifted_term
           • (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              extend_tuple

                 var (stnweq (...)))
                (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))
                (stnweq (inl i0)))
          extend_tuple

                          (inflate A var (...))
                          (stnweq (...)))
                    extend_tuple
                      (λ i2 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
                       var (stnweq (...)))
                      (inflate A
                      var (stnweq (inr tt)))
                      (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0))))
     (stnweq (inl i))) =
var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))

            apply inflate_var.
        Qed.

        Definition lifted_mor
          : R_mor A exponential_ob
          := lifted_term ,, lifted_is_mor.

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
· eval_mor

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
· eval_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
pr1 h =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
   · eval_mor)

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
C ∘ h ∘ prod A B =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
   · eval_mor)

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate (C ∘ h)
⟨ (inflate (A ∘ π1) var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(inflate (B ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩)) =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
   · eval_mor)

(λ'n,
(inflate C

  var (stnweq (inr tt))),
