L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A
  (inflate A (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))),
(inflate B ∘ π2 var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩))) =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
   · eval_mor)

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A
  (inflate A (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
pr1
  (# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor
   · eval_mor)

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A
  (inflate A (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
((inflate
    (BinProductPr1 R
       (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
          (constant_functor R R B A))
     · # (functor_identity R) lifted_mor)
 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B
(inflate
   (BinProductPr2 R
      (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
         (constant_functor R R B A))
    · # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A
  (inflate A (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
((inflate
    (λ'n,
    (λ'S n,
    (inflate (inflate h)
    ⟨ inflate
        (inflate (functor_identity R A)
        (inflate π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
    var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B
(inflate
   (BinProductPr2 R
      (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
         (constant_functor R R B A))
    · # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

      (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
      (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate B
(inflate
   (BinProductPr2 R
      (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
         (constant_functor R R B A))
    · # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0

        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l

           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)

               i0)) (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
       • extend_tuple var
           (inflate B

         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l

• extend_tuple var

       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B
(inflate (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
(inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B
(inflate (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
(inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B
 ∘ inflate (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
 ∘ inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate (B ∘ # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
 ∘ inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate
   (B ∘ # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor
    ∘ constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate (B ∘ constant_functor R R B A)
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(inflate h
⟨ (inflate A (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩))) =
(λ'n,
(inflate C
(h
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         inflate
           ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple (λ i2 : ...%stn, var ...)
               (var (...)) t_l0
             • extend_tuple var (var (...))) i1))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • extend_tuple var
          (inflate B
          (inflate
             (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
           ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A) ∘ π2)
          var (stnweq (inr tt))))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ (functor_identity R A
   • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i1 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           inflate
             ((λ t_l0 : (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn,
               extend_tuple (...) (...) t_l0
               • extend_tuple var (...)) i1))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var
            (inflate B
            (inflate
               (# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor)
             ∘ (inflate (constant_functor R R B A)
                ∘ π2) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
         (stnweq (inl i0))) (stnweq (inl i)))
  (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
(inflate B (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)))

          refine '(
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (app (_ • x) _)))) _ @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (app _ (⟨(app (_ • x) _), _⟩))))) _
          );
            apply funextfun;
            intro i;
            refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, (x • _)) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _));
            refine '(_ @ !subst_inflate _ _ _);
            refine '(_ @ !subst_subst L (extend_tuple _ _ _) _ _);
            refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, (x • _)) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _));
            refine '(_ @ !var_subst _ _ _);
            refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, (x • _)) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _));
            refine '(_ @ !var_subst _ _ _);
            exact (!extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
        Qed.

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
lifted_mor' = lifted_mor

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
lifted_mor' = lifted_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
pr1 lifted_mor' = pr1 lifted_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
exponential_ob ∘ lifted_mor' ∘ A = pr1 lifted_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
exponential_ob ∘ (lifted_mor' ∘ A) = pr1 lifted_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate (ev C B))
⟨ inflate
    (inflate lifted_mor'
    (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) = pr1 lifted_mor

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L

B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C

H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (ev (inflate C) (inflate B))
⟨ inflate
    (inflate lifted_mor'
    (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) = pr1 lifted_mor

· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(ev (inflate (inflate C)) (inflate (inflate B))
⟨ inflate
    (inflate lifted_mor'
    (inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) = pr1 lifted_mor

((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')

n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B) ∘ inflate (inflate B)
 ∘ inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
pr1 lifted_mor

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))))) =
curry
  (λ'n,
  (inflate C
  ((inflate
      (BinProductPr1 R
         (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
            (constant_functor R R B A))
       · # (functor_identity R) lifted_mor')
   var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (inflate B
  (inflate
     (BinProductPr2 R
        (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
           (constant_functor R R B A))
      · # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor')
  var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate
   (λ'1 + n,
   (inflate C
   ((inflate
       (BinProductPr1 R
          (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
             (constant_functor R R B A))
        · # (functor_identity R) lifted_mor')
    var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (inflate B
   (inflate
      (BinProductPr2 R
         (R_binproducts (functor_identity R A)
            (constant_functor R R B A))
       · # (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor')
   var (stnweq (inr tt))))))
   • extend_tuple
       (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
((# (functor_identity R) lifted_mor'
  • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
         • extend_tuple var
             ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))),
             var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
       (stnweq (inl i)))
  ∘ (functor_identity R A
     • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
         • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
            extend_tuple
              (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
               var (stnweq (inl ...)))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
            • extend_tuple var
                ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (...))),
                var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
          (stnweq (inl i)))
     ∘ π1
       • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
          (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           extend_tuple
             (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
              var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))))
             (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
           • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
              extend_tuple
                (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
                 var (stnweq (inl ...)))
                (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
              • extend_tuple var
                  ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (...))),
                  var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
            (stnweq (inl i))))
 ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
 var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)
(B
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,

          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))))

(# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor'
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l

        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (...))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
 ∘ (constant_functor R R B A
    • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
       (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
           extend_tuple
             (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (...)))
             (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
           • extend_tuple var
               ⟨ var (stnweq (inl ...)),
               var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
         (stnweq (inl i)))
    ∘ π2
      • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
          extend_tuple
            (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
             var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))))
            (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
          • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
             extend_tuple

                var (stnweq (...)))

             • extend_tuple var

           (stnweq (inl i))))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),

     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (...))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
(π2
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))))))))

          
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R_ob
h: R_mor (prod A B) C
lifted_mor': R_mor A exponential_ob
H: h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) lifted_mor'
· eval_mor
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(inflate (inflate C)
((inflate (inflate lifted_mor')
 (inflate (inflate A)
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B)
(inflate (inflate B) var (stnweq (inr tt))))))))) =
(λ'n,
(λ'S n,
(C
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
((# (functor_identity R) lifted_mor'
  • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
         • extend_tuple var
             ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
             var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
       (stnweq (inl i)))
 (functor_identity R A
  • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
      extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
         var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
      • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
         extend_tuple
           (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
            var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))))
           (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
         • extend_tuple var
             ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))),
             var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
       (stnweq (inl i)))
 var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))
(B
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
(# (constant_functor R R B) lifted_mor'
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (...)))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
(constant_functor R R B A
 • (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
    (λ t_l : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • (λ t_l0 : (⟦ S (S n) ⟧)%stn,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
           var (stnweq (inl (...))))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var
            ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq ...))),
            var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)) (stnweq (inl i)))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))))))

          refine '(
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app x _)))) _ @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app _ (app (app x _) _))))) _ @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app _ (app (app _ (app x _)) _))))) _ @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app _ (app _ (app x _)))))) _ @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app _ (app _ (app _ (app x _))))))) _  @
            maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (app _ (app _ (app _ (app _ (app x _)))))))) _
          );
            refine '((subst_subst _ _ _ _ : inflate (inflate _) = _) @ _);
            refine '(maponpaths (λ x, _ • x) _);
            apply funextfun;
            intro i;
            refine '(var_subst _ _ _ @ _);
            refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, x • _) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _));
            refine '(_ @ !var_subst _ _ _);
            refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, x • _) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _));
            refine '(_ @ !var_subst _ _ _);
            exact (!extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
        Qed.

      End Lambda.

    End Object.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R
is_universal_arrow_from
  (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) C
  (exponential_ob B C) (eval_mor B C)

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C: R
is_universal_arrow_from
  (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) C
  (exponential_ob B C) (eval_mor B C)

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
∃! f' : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
h =
# (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) f'
· eval_mor B C

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
(λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
 h =
 # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
 · eval_mor B C) ?x
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
    h =
    # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
    · eval_mor B C) y)
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
(λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
 h =
 # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
 · eval_mor B C) y → y = ?x

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧
 exact (lifted_mor B C A h).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
(λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
 h =
 # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
 · eval_mor B C) (lifted_mor B C A h)
 exact (lifted_mor_commutes B C A h).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
    h =
    # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
    · eval_mor B C) y)
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
y: R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
    h =
    # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
    · eval_mor B C) y)

        apply homset_property.
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B, C, A: R
h: R ⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B A, C ⟧
∏ y : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
(λ t : R ⟦ A, exponential_ob B C ⟧,
 h =
 # (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) t
 · eval_mor B C) y → y = lifted_mor B C A h
 apply lifted_mor_unique.
    Defined.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
Exponentials R_binproducts

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
Exponentials R_binproducts

B: R
is_exponentiable R_binproducts B

is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B)

B: R
R → R

B: R

Lβ: has_β L

B: R

is_universal_arrow_from
  (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) a (?G0 a)
  (?eps a)

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R
R → R
 exact (exponential_ob B).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R
∏ a : R,
R
⟦ constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B
    (exponential_ob B a), a ⟧
 exact (eval_mor B).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
B: R
∏ a : R,
is_universal_arrow_from
  (constprod_functor2 R_binproducts B) a
  (exponential_ob B a) (eval_mor B a)
 apply is_universal_arrow.
    Defined.

  End Exponentials.

(** * 6. Every object is a retract of λ x, x *)

  Section Retractions.

    Definition U_term
      {m : nat}
      : L m
      := abs (var (stnweq (inr tt))).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
U_term • f = U_term

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
U_term • f = U_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
(λ'm',
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (f i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = U_term

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m, m': ℕ
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L m'
(λ'm',
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (f i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))) = U_term

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs x)) (extend_tuple_inr _ _ _)).
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
f: L m
(U_term f) = f

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
f: L m
(U_term f) = f

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
f: L m
var (stnweq (inr tt)) • extend_tuple var f = f

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n, m: ℕ
f: L m
extend_tuple var f (stnweq (inr tt)) = f

      apply extend_tuple_inr.
    Qed.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
t: L (S n)
U_term ∘ (λ'n, t) = (λ'n, t)

t: L (S n)

t: L (S n)
(λ'n, (inflate U_term t)) = (λ'n, t)

((λ'1 + n,

     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) t)) = (λ'n, t)

(λ'n, t)

    var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l • extend_tuple var t)
  (stnweq (inr tt))) = (λ'n, t)

t: L (S n)
(λ'n, var (stnweq (inr tt)) • extend_tuple var t) =

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
t: L (S n)
(λ'n, extend_tuple var t (stnweq (inr tt))) = (λ'n, t)

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs x)) (extend_tuple_inr _ _ _)).
    Qed.

t: L (S n)
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i')))) =
var (stnweq (inl i'))

        exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
t: L (S n)
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
extend_tuple
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr i'))
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
var (stnweq (inr i'))
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
t: L (S n)
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
var (stnweq (inr i'))

        
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
t: L (S n)
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
extend_tuple var (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inr tt)) = var (stnweq (inr i'))

        exact (extend_tuple_inr _ _ _).
    Qed.

    Definition U
      : R_ob
      := U_term ,, U_compose _.

    Context (A : R_ob).

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
A ∘ A ∘ U = A

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
A ∘ A ∘ U = A

      exact (compose_U _ @ R_ob_idempotent _).
    Qed.

    Definition R_retraction
      : R_mor U A
      := (A : L n) ,, R_retraction_is_mor.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
U ∘ A ∘ A = A

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
U ∘ A ∘ A = A

      exact (!compose_assoc _ Lβ _ _ _ @ U_compose _ @ R_ob_idempotent _).
    Qed.

    Definition R_section
      : R_mor A U
      := (A : L n) ,, R_section_is_mor.

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
is_retraction R_section R_retraction

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
is_retraction R_section R_retraction

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
A: R_ob
pr1 (R_section · R_retraction) = pr1 (identity A)

      apply R_ob_idempotent.
    Qed.

  End Retractions.

End Category.
